summary: Frontend-only test of the Reviews (Отзывы) carousel. All 11 review cards render with quote, name, role, and circular initial avatar. Horizontal scroll track present. Desktop shows ~3 cards visible (card/track ratio 0.32). Next/prev arrows correctly scroll the track (scrollLeft 4→428→4). Language toggle to EN preserves 11 cards, translates content, and arrows continue to work (4→428). Mobile viewport 390x844 shows ~1 card at a time (ratio 0.83 with next-card peek), and mobile arrows (reviews-next-mobile / reviews-prev-mobile) scroll the track correctly (319→633→319). Desktop screenshot captured.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Reviews carousel verified end-to-end on desktop (1440x900) and mobile (390x844) in both RU and EN. Selectors used: reviews-track, reviews-next, reviews-prev, reviews-next-mobile, reviews-prev-mobile, review-card-0..10, lang-en.
